accepted_repairs: Replaced unsupported memory-compression language with recon-log pruning, telemetry calibration, and audit/compliance machinery.
Added Rossum & Douglas security-client pressure to the digest and fixture frame.
Kept Chaos Weavers future-facing as a bounded outside-interface principle rather than a mature 2470 organization.
Kept Kesh's system access bounded to raven affordances: beak, talon, short flight, mimicry, contact pad, optical proof, telemetry surfaces, and route memory.
backfill_candidates: Room-scale geometry and standard equipment pattern for NeuroSyn Corvid Recon containment/audit sites.
Exact physical interface affordances for uplifted ravens interacting with corporate telemetry systems.
notes: The fixture is accepted as lore-grounded draft/reference material. It is not full training-ready responder/appraiser/mutator data because it lacks per-turn projected contexts, exact character packets, raw character outputs, event/appraisal/mutation receipts, and a complete scene-loop bundle.
